objective: Make schema/write-boundary hook failures loud and actionable so PreToolUse:Bash never exits nonzero without stderr.
scope_boundary: Add or harden the repo-owned Bash schema guard with explicit diagnostics.
Wire the guard into .claude/settings.json for PreToolUse:Bash.
Add fixture tests for policy block stderr, missing schema stderr, malformed payload stderr, validator nonzero summaries, allowed read-only commands, and Python file write blocks.
out_of_scope: Allowing planner/orchestrator lanes to create code files directly.
Worker handoff routing changes beyond preserving the path created in issue #448.
research_summary: The repository did not track .claude/hooks/schema-guard.sh even though governed repo compendium entries referenced schema guard hooks. Issue #447 adds the repo-owned Bash guard and fixture coverage so policy refusals and internal failures always produce stderr diagnostics.

sprints.name: Schema guard diagnostics
sprints.goal: Ensure Bash hook failures emit explicit stderr diagnostics while preserving policy blocks.
tasks: Add hooks/schema-guard.sh with fail helper and unexpected-error trap.
Validate hook payloads, repo root, optional schema/config, and optional validator command before policy checks.
Block Bash file-write patterns with path/rule/next-action stderr.
Wire the hook for PreToolUse:Bash in .claude/settings.json.
Add fixture tests for silent-crash and policy-refusal paths.
Record issue #447 evidence and run deterministic gates.
acceptance_criteria: hooks/schema-guard.sh never exits nonzero without non-empty stderr in covered cases.
Policy blocks include blocked path/command, rule name, and next action.
Internal hook failures include hook name, line or phase, and shortest useful failing command/reason.
Missing dependency/config/schema cases emit explicit diagnostics.
Schema validation failures identify the affected validator command and shortest useful reason.
Tests cover blocked Bash file write, missing schema/config, malformed input payload, validator nonzero summary, allowed read-only command, and expected policy block nonzero.
Existing governance write-boundary protections remain enforced.

specialist_reviews.focus: Schema guard diagnostics hook and tests.
specialist_reviews.summary: The immediately prior supervised Sonnet worker handoff failed at max turns with no edits. Codex implemented this small diagnostic slice under the material deviation rule and retained Codex QA.

alternate_model_review.summary: Codex QA reviewed hook diagnostics, fixture coverage, and governance evidence.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Implement governance-only schema guard diagnostics, settings wiring, fixture tests, issue evidence, validation, review, and closeout for issue #447.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Run focused validation, Local CI Gate, closeout, PR, and automerge if green.
handoff_acceptance_criteria: Schema guard nonzero exits in covered cases include stderr.
Local CI Gate passes before merge.

material_deviation_rules: If downstream repos need propagation, create downstream issues instead of editing them here.
If Sonnet worker tooling remains unstable after prior max-turn failure, record the evidence and continue with Codex implementation plus Codex QA.
approved_by: operator approval: no HITL, loop remaining child issues
